HomePage.title: Discover Ecuador
HomePage.subtitle: A world-class adventure at the center of the earth

About.title: Our Travel Philosophy
About.description: We don't sell tour packages, we craft lifetime memories. We believe in travel that connects deeply with the essence of Ecuador, respecting its nature and celebrating its living culture.
About.cta: Ready to start your own story?
About.experts_desc: We know every corner of Ecuador, from the Andean peaks to the Galapagos.
About.security_desc: We work with top hotels and certified guides to ensure your well-being.
About.unique_desc: Personalized itineraries that will leave you breathless with exclusive memories.

galapagos.name: Insular Region (Galapagos)
galapagos.description: The enchanted archipelago. A natural laboratory with unique species in the world.

costa.name: Coastal Region
costa.description: Extensive beaches, tropical weather, mangroves, and exquisite Pacific gastronomy.

sierra.name: Andean Region (Sierra)
sierra.description: Majestic snow-capped mountains, colonial cities, and Andean communities full of history.

oriente.name: Amazon Region (Oriente)
oriente.description: The heart of the Amazon. Unmatched biodiversity and ancestral cultures.

casagangotena.name: Casa Gangotena
casagangotena.description: A luxury boutique hotel located in the historic San Francisco Plaza.

finchbay.name: Finch Bay Spa
finchbay.description: Premium eco-hotel with direct beach access in Puerto Ayora.

mashpilodge.name: Mashpi Lodge
mashpilodge.description: A glass refuge immersed in the dense jungle of the Andean Choco.

Tours.whatsapp_text: Hello, I am interested in the plan:

costa-sun.name: Route of the Sun
costa-sun.description: Relax on the best beaches of the Pacific and enjoy coastal gastronomy.

itinerary.title: Arrival
itinerary.description: Reception and free afternoon.

itinerary.title: Yacht tour
itinerary.description: Visit to nearby islands and snorkeling.

itinerary.title: Beach Day
itinerary.description: Water activities and relaxation.

itinerary.title: Return
itinerary.description: Farewell and return.

galapagos-explorer.name: Galapagos Explorer
galapagos-explorer.description: Discover evolution at its finest exploring the enchanted islands.
galapagos-explorer.lodging: Finch Bay Spa or First Class hotel

itinerary.title: Arrival at Baltra
itinerary.description: Airport reception and transfer to Santa Cruz.

itinerary.title: Navio Islet Tour
itinerary.description: Full day of navigation and marine life.

itinerary.title: Tortuga Bay
itinerary.description: Hike through iguana trail to white sand beach.

itinerary.title: Highlands
itinerary.description: Visit giant tortoise ranch in the wild.

itinerary.title: Return
itinerary.description: Transfer to airport for international flight.

quito-historical.name: Quito & Middle of the World
quito-historical.description: Immerse yourself in the living history of the capital and step on both hemispheres.

itinerary.title: Arrival
itinerary.description: Check-in and free afternoon in Historic Center.

itinerary.title: City Tour
itinerary.description: Visit Basilica, Compania de Jesus and Panecillo.

itinerary.title: Middle of the World
itinerary.description: Experiences at parallel 0° and return.

amazon-adventure.name: Amazon Adventure
amazon-adventure.description: Total disconnection deep in the Napo jungle.

itinerary.title: Jungle Entry
itinerary.description: Motorized canoe trip to the lodge.

itinerary.title: Canopy & Wildlife
itinerary.description: Ascent to observation tower and hiking.

itinerary.title: Local Culture
itinerary.description: Interaction with native families of Napo.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Return upriver to the citadel.

banos-extreme.name: Extreme Banos
banos-extreme.description: Pure adrenaline in the Andean adventure capital.

itinerary.title: Waterfall Route
itinerary.description: Bike tour to Pailon del Diablo.

itinerary.title: Extreme Sports
itinerary.description: Morning Rafting and afternoon Canyoning.

itinerary.title: Relaxation
itinerary.description: Morning in hot springs before departing.

galapagos-luxury.name: First Class Galapagos
galapagos-luxury.description: Exhaustive expedition cruise exploration with all the luxury and comfort.

itinerary.title: Embarkation
itinerary.description: Airport arrival and yacht welcome.

itinerary.title: Navigation
itinerary.description: Visit to Western Islands (Isabela, Fernandina).

itinerary.title: Disembarkation
itinerary.description: Final visit to Charles Darwin Center and flight back.

costa-adventure.name: Surf & Whales
costa-adventure.description: Dive into the Pacific Ocean, surf perfect waves, and watch majestic humpback whales.

itinerary.title: Spondylus Route
itinerary.description: Transfer and check-in. Free beach afternoon.

itinerary.title: Surf
itinerary.description: Intensive morning surf lesson.

itinerary.title: Whales
itinerary.description: Navigation to Machalilla National Park.

itinerary.title: Los Frailes
itinerary.description: Visit to pristine beach Los Frailes.

itinerary.title: Return
itinerary.description: Free morning and return home.

cuenca-colonial.name: Cuenca & Cajas
cuenca-colonial.description: Enjoy the Athens of Ecuador and the natural mysticism of Cajas National Park.

itinerary.title: Welcome
itinerary.description: Check-in and night walk along Tomebamba river.

itinerary.title: City Tour
itinerary.description: Cathedrals, Pumapungo ruins and Turi viewpoint.

itinerary.title: Cajas National Park
itinerary.description: Hiking around glacial lagoons.

itinerary.title: Farewell
itinerary.description: Last minute shopping and airport transfer.

yasuni-deep.name: Deep Yasuni
yasuni-deep.description: The greatest biodiversity in the world awaits. Visit parrot clay licks and black lagoons.

itinerary.title: Napo River
itinerary.description: Deep 2-hour navigation in speedboat.

itinerary.title: Clay Licks
itinerary.description: Morning visit to clay wall and parrots.

itinerary.title: Canopy Tower
itinerary.description: Bird watching from 130 feet above.

itinerary.title: Añangu Lake
itinerary.description: Paddle canoe trip in wetlands and monkey watching.

itinerary.title: Return
itinerary.description: Early navigation towards Coca airport.

Contact.ready_desc: Quote your ideal package with our travel advisors. We will reply in less than 24 business hours so you can start your adventure in Ecuador.
Contact.form_msg_placeholder: Which destinations would you like to visit?
